name: Santo di Teufel
description: Baron Hanzo's cruel son and heir -- a sadistic young fire-mage and demonology dabbler who attempted a spirit-binding ritual on the courtesan Emmeralda and dropped his ritual knife fleeing the scene.
narrative: Santo di Teufel is Baron Hanzo's cruel, entitled heir, trained in his father's dark arts. A junior fire-mage with a taste for cruelty (Lust 80, Arrogance & Entitlement 75), he is charming and predatory in equal measure (Seduction 81, Deceit 66). He attempted a demonic spirit-binding ritual on the elven courtesan Emmeralda at the Sylph's Embrace -- and dropped his Asmodeus-marked ritual knife as he fled, leaving the key evidence that ties the di Teufels to the possession scheme.

equipment.name: Rapier
equipment.notes: Impale (damage not filled on sheet; CFI standard used)

equipment.name: Ritual knife (soul-knife, symbol of Asmodeus)
equipment.notes: Demonologist's binding knife per lore; dropped during the attack on Emmeralda -- key plot evidence

extras.class_note: Junior arcane fire-mage / demonology dabbler, Rank 1; far weaker than his father Hanzo. Defining skills: Lore (Demonology) 50, 8 arcane spells (fire-focused).
extras.role: Baron Hanzo's cruel heir; sadistic predator; attempted Emmeralda's spirit-binding ritual (dropped the ritual knife = key evidence).
extras.magic_theme: Fire and lightning (Flaming Hands, Affect Normal Fires, Fireball, Lightning Bolt, Shocking Touch) + utility (Magic Missile, Levitate, Web).
extras.family: Son and heir of Baron Hanzo di Teufel; half-brother/double of the twins Randall & Conall (all three uncannily identical, all Hanzo's sons)
extras.sheet_cleanup_note: On the Roll20 sheet Arcane Casting & Arcane Knowledge were a broken -75 -- supplied working values (Casting 55, Knowledge 50) for a junior mage; GM adjust as desired. Rapier damage was blank on the sheet (CFI standard 1d8 used).
extras.source: Roll20 Classic Fantasy character sheet (And then the Dragons Came campaign)
